full_text:
Hou Zhe
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hou Zhe. A guardsman, executed by Cao Cao when the warlord took control of the court. Hou Zhe was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Hou Zhe lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
